title: [ELS Addon] Trailer-style Loading Screens
description: ELS (Enhanced Loading Screen) add-on that adds trailer-like loading screens
body:
# ELS Trailer Add-On
An ELS (Enhanced Loading Screens) add-on that adds 8 trailer-style image to your loading Screen!

**REQUIRES THE ELS MOD, PACK HAS NOT BEEN MADE BY THE OFFICIAL MOD CREATOR**

Works on any ELS version.
[Download ELS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-loading-screens/)
